facts.truth: a boy falling from a tree onto the ground

facts.context: A student is investigating the properties of a mineral. The student tests the mineral by putting it under an ultraviolet light. Which property of the mineral can be identified using this test?

distractors: surface water evaporating into the atmosphere
glaciers melting because of increasing temperatures

When observing a very small piece of dust in a liquid under a microscope, the dust appears to jiggle slightly. This movement results from the dust interacting with the molecules in the liquid. What property of the molecules in the liquid causes this effect?
facts.truth: The molecules are always in random motion.
distractors: The molecules briefly form chemical bonds with nearby objects.
The molecules transfer an electric charge to the dust particles.

facts.context: What is the main advantage of making a laptop computer light in weight?
facts.truth: to make it easy to carry
distractors: to keep it simple to build
to make the screen easy to read
to provide storage for an electrical cord

facts.context: What happens to the path of a light ray as it passes from air into water at an angle?
distractors: Its path continues in a straight line.

facts.truth: They vibrate in place within a fixed volume.
distractors: They move around freely within a fixed volume.
They vibrate in place and take the shape of a container.
They move around freely and take the shape of a container.
